revision.comment: Support sign_img2 for BSL, promoted from sandbox
revision.text:
{| cellspacing=0 cellpadding=0 width=100% style="text-align: center; background: white;" |- style="font-size: 85%; line-height: 125%;" | width=50% style="border-left: 1px solid silver; border-top: 1px solid silver; line-height:1.3em; padding:0.3em;" | {{letter reps/links|{{{lang|}}}|radio}} | width=50% style="border-left: 1px solid silver; border-top: 1px solid silver; border-right: 1px solid silver;" | {{letter reps/links|{{{lang|}}}|morse}} |- style="font-family: monospace; font-weight: bold; line-height: 100%; font-size:150%" | width=50% style="border-left: 1px solid silver; padding:0.3em;" | {{{radio|}}}
{{{radio_trans|}}} | width=50% style="border-left: 1px solid silver; border-right: 1px solid silver; font-size: large;" | {{#if:{{{morse_sound|}}}|{{audio|{{{morse_sound}}}|{{letter reps/morse|{{{morse|}}}}}|help=no}}|{{letter reps/morse|{{{morse|}}}}}}}{{#if:{{{morsealt|}}}|
OR {{#if:{{{morse_sound|}}}|{{audio|{{{morsealt_sound}}}|{{letter reps/morse|{{{morsealt}}}}}|help=no}}|{{{morsealt|}}}}} ({{{morsealt_exp|}}})}} |} {| cellspacing=0 cellpadding=0 width=100% style="text-align: center; background: white;" |- style="height: 80px;" | width={{#if:{{{sign_img2|}}}|20|25}}% style="border-left: 1px solid silver; border-top: 1px solid silver; padding:0.3em;" | {{#if:{{{flag_img|}}}|[[Image:{{{flag_img|}}}|75px|border]]|}} | width={{#if:{{{sign_img2|}}}|20|25}}% style="border-left: 1px solid silver; border-top: 1px solid silver; padding:0.3em;" | {{#if:{{{sem2|}}}|{{#if:{{{sem3|}}}|[[Image:{{{sem1|}}}|40px]][[Image:{{{sem2|}}}|40px]][[Image:{{{sem3|}}}|40px]]|[[Image:{{{sem1|}}}|50px]][[Image:{{{sem2|}}}|50px]]}}|{{#if:{{{sem1|}}}|[[Image:{{{sem1|}}}|90px]]|}}}} | width={{#if:{{{sign_img2|}}}|20|25}}% style="border-left: 1px solid silver; border-top: 1px solid silver; padding:0.3em;" | {{#if:{{{sign_img|}}}|[[File:{{{sign_img|}}}|90px]]|}}{{ifnotempty|{{{sign_img2|}}}| {{!}} width{{=}}20% style{{=}}"border-left: 1px solid silver; border-top: 1px solid silver; padding:0.3em;" {{!}} [[File:{{{sign_img2|}}}|90px]]|}} | width={{#if:{{{sign_img2|}}}|20|25}}% style="border-left: 1px solid silver; border-right: 1px solid silver; border-top: 1px solid silver; padding:0.3em;" | {{#if:{{{braille_img|}}}|[[Image:{{{braille_img|}}}|77px|{{{braille|}}}]]|{{braille cell|{{{braille|}}}|type=image|size=50px}}}} |- style="font-size: 85%; line-height: 125%;" | width={{#if:{{{sign_img2|}}}|20|25}}% style="border-left: 1px solid silver; border-bottom: 1px solid silver; padding-bottom:0.3em;" | {{letter reps/links|{{{lang|}}}|flag}} | width={{#if:{{{sign_img2|}}}|20|25}}% style="border-left: 1px solid silver; border-bottom: 1px solid silver;" | {{letter reps/links|{{{lang|}}}|sema}} | width={{#if:{{{sign_img2|}}}|20|25}}% style="border-left: 1px solid silver; border-bottom: 1px solid silver;" | {{letter reps/links|{{{lang|}}}|manual}}{{ifnotempty|{{{sign_img2|}}}| {{!}} width{{=}}20% style{{=}}"border-left: 1px solid silver; border-bottom: 1px solid silver;" {{!}} {{letter reps/links|{{{lang|}}}|manual2}}|}} | width={{#if:{{{sign_img2|}}}|20|25}}% style="border-left: 1px solid silver; border-right: 1px solid silver; border-bottom: 1px solid silver;" | {{#if:{{{braille|}}} | [[Braille pattern dots-{{Braille cell/english&cell2dot-id|input={{{braille}}}}}|Braille dots-{{Braille cell/english&cell2dot-id|input={{{braille}}}}}]]
|}} {{letter reps/links|{{{lang|}}}|braille}} |}
{{documentation}}

{| cellspacing=0 cellpadding=0 width=100% style="text-align: center; background: white;" |- style="font-size: 85%; line-height: 125%;" | width=50% style="border-left: 1px solid silver; border-top: 1px solid silver; line-height:1.3em; padding:0.3em;" | {{letter reps/links|{{{lang|}}}|radio}} | width=50% style="border-left: 1px solid silver; border-top: 1px solid silver; border-right: 1px solid silver;" | {{letter reps/links|{{{lang|}}}|morse}} |- style="font-family: monospace; font-weight: bold; line-height: 100%; font-size:150%" | width=50% style="border-left: 1px solid silver; padding:0.3em;" | {{{radio|}}}
{{{radio_trans|}}} | width=50% style="border-left: 1px solid silver; border-right: 1px solid silver; font-size: large;" | {{#if:{{{morse_sound|}}}|{{audio|{{{morse_sound}}}|{{letter reps/morse|{{{morse|}}}}}|help=no}}|{{letter reps/morse|{{{morse|}}}}}}}{{#if:{{{morsealt|}}}|
OR {{#if:{{{morse_sound|}}}|{{audio|{{{morsealt_sound}}}|{{letter reps/morse|{{{morsealt}}}}}|help=no}}|{{{morsealt|}}}}} ({{{morsealt_exp|}}})}} |} {| cellspacing=0 cellpadding=0 width=100% style="text-align: center; background: white;" |- style="height: 80px;" | width={{#if:{{{sign_img2|}}}|20|25}}% style="border-left: 1px solid silver; border-top: 1px solid silver; padding:0.3em;" | {{#if:{{{flag_img|}}}|[[Image:{{{flag_img|}}}|75px|border]]|}} | width={{#if:{{{sign_img2|}}}|20|25}}% style="border-left: 1px solid silver; border-top: 1px solid silver; padding:0.3em;" | {{#if:{{{sem2|}}}|{{#if:{{{sem3|}}}|[[Image:{{{sem1|}}}|40px]][[Image:{{{sem2|}}}|40px]][[Image:{{{sem3|}}}|40px]]|[[Image:{{{sem1|}}}|50px]][[Image:{{{sem2|}}}|50px]]}}|{{#if:{{{sem1|}}}|[[Image:{{{sem1|}}}|90px]]|}}}} | width={{#if:{{{sign_img2|}}}|20|25}}% style="border-left: 1px solid silver; border-top: 1px solid silver; padding:0.3em;" | {{#if:{{{sign_img|}}}|[[File:{{{sign_img|}}}|90px]]|}}{{ifnotempty|{{{sign_img2|}}}| {{!}} width{{=}}20% style{{=}}"border-left: 1px solid silver; border-top: 1px solid silver; padding:0.3em;" {{!}} [[File:{{{sign_img2|}}}|90px]]|}} | width={{#if:{{{sign_img2|}}}|20|25}}% style="border-left: 1px solid silver; border-right: 1px solid silver; border-top: 1px solid silver; padding:0.3em;" | {{#if:{{{braille_img|}}}|[[Image:{{{braille_img|}}}|77px|{{{braille|}}}]]|{{braille cell|{{{braille|}}}|type=image|size=50px}}}} |- style="font-size: 85%; line-height: 125%;" | width={{#if:{{{sign_img2|}}}|20|25}}% style="border-left: 1px solid silver; border-bottom: 1px solid silver; padding-bottom:0.3em;" | {{letter reps/links|{{{lang|}}}|flag}} | width={{#if:{{{sign_img2|}}}|20|25}}% style="border-left: 1px solid silver; border-bottom: 1px solid silver;" | {{letter reps/links|{{{lang|}}}|sema}} | width={{#if:{{{sign_img2|}}}|20|25}}% style="border-left: 1px solid silver; border-bottom: 1px solid silver;" | {{letter reps/links|{{{lang|}}}|manual}}{{ifnotempty|{{{sign_img2|}}}| {{!}} width{{=}}20% style{{=}}"border-left: 1px solid silver; border-bottom: 1px solid silver;" {{!}} {{letter reps/links|{{{lang|}}}|manual2}}|}} | width={{#if:{{{sign_img2|}}}|20|25}}% style="border-left: 1px solid silver; border-right: 1px solid silver; border-bottom: 1px solid silver;" | {{#if:{{{braille|}}} | [[Braille pattern dots-{{Braille cell/english&cell2dot-id|input={{{braille}}}}}|Braille dots-{{Braille cell/english&cell2dot-id|input={{{braille}}}}}]]
|}} {{letter reps/links|{{{lang|}}}|braille}} |}
{{documentation}}

revision.comment: Support sign_img2 for BSL, promoted from sandbox
revision.text:
{| cellspacing=0 cellpadding=0 width=100% style="text-align: center; background: white;" |- style="font-size: 85%; line-height: 125%;" | width=50% style="border-left: 1px solid silver; border-top: 1px solid silver; line-height:1.3em; padding:0.3em;" | {{letter reps/links|{{{lang|}}}|radio}} | width=50% style="border-left: 1px solid silver; border-top: 1px solid silver; border-right: 1px solid silver;" | {{letter reps/links|{{{lang|}}}|morse}} |- style="font-family: monospace; font-weight: bold; line-height: 100%; font-size:150%" | width=50% style="border-left: 1px solid silver; padding:0.3em;" | {{{radio|}}}
{{{radio_trans|}}} | width=50% style="border-left: 1px solid silver; border-right: 1px solid silver; font-size: large;" | {{#if:{{{morse_sound|}}}|{{audio|{{{morse_sound}}}|{{letter reps/morse|{{{morse|}}}}}|help=no}}|{{letter reps/morse|{{{morse|}}}}}}}{{#if:{{{morsealt|}}}|
OR {{#if:{{{morse_sound|}}}|{{audio|{{{morsealt_sound}}}|{{letter reps/morse|{{{morsealt}}}}}|help=no}}|{{{morsealt|}}}}} ({{{morsealt_exp|}}})}} |} {| cellspacing=0 cellpadding=0 width=100% style="text-align: center; background: white;" |- style="height: 80px;" | width={{#if:{{{sign_img2|}}}|20|25}}% style="border-left: 1px solid silver; border-top: 1px solid silver; padding:0.3em;" | {{#if:{{{flag_img|}}}|[[Image:{{{flag_img|}}}|75px|border]]|}} | width={{#if:{{{sign_img2|}}}|20|25}}% style="border-left: 1px solid silver; border-top: 1px solid silver; padding:0.3em;" | {{#if:{{{sem2|}}}|{{#if:{{{sem3|}}}|[[Image:{{{sem1|}}}|40px]][[Image:{{{sem2|}}}|40px]][[Image:{{{sem3|}}}|40px]]|[[Image:{{{sem1|}}}|50px]][[Image:{{{sem2|}}}|50px]]}}|{{#if:{{{sem1|}}}|[[Image:{{{sem1|}}}|90px]]|}}}} | width={{#if:{{{sign_img2|}}}|20|25}}% style="border-left: 1px solid silver; border-top: 1px solid silver; padding:0.3em;" | {{#if:{{{sign_img|}}}|[[File:{{{sign_img|}}}|90px]]|}}{{ifnotempty|{{{sign_img2|}}}| {{!}} width{{=}}20% style{{=}}"border-left: 1px solid silver; border-top: 1px solid silver; padding:0.3em;" {{!}} [[File:{{{sign_img2|}}}|90px]]|}} | width={{#if:{{{sign_img2|}}}|20|25}}% style="border-left: 1px solid silver; border-right: 1px solid silver; border-top: 1px solid silver; padding:0.3em;" | {{#if:{{{braille_img|}}}|[[Image:{{{braille_img|}}}|77px|{{{braille|}}}]]|{{braille cell|{{{braille|}}}|type=image|size=50px}}}} |- style="font-size: 85%; line-height: 125%;" | width={{#if:{{{sign_img2|}}}|20|25}}% style="border-left: 1px solid silver; border-bottom: 1px solid silver; padding-bottom:0.3em;" | {{letter reps/links|{{{lang|}}}|flag}} | width={{#if:{{{sign_img2|}}}|20|25}}% style="border-left: 1px solid silver; border-bottom: 1px solid silver;" | {{letter reps/links|{{{lang|}}}|sema}} | width={{#if:{{{sign_img2|}}}|20|25}}% style="border-left: 1px solid silver; border-bottom: 1px solid silver;" | {{letter reps/links|{{{lang|}}}|manual}}{{ifnotempty|{{{sign_img2|}}}| {{!}} width{{=}}20% style{{=}}"border-left: 1px solid silver; border-bottom: 1px solid silver;" {{!}} {{letter reps/links|{{{lang|}}}|manual2}}|}} | width={{#if:{{{sign_img2|}}}|20|25}}% style="border-left: 1px solid silver; border-right: 1px solid silver; border-bottom: 1px solid silver;" | {{#if:{{{braille|}}} | [[Braille pattern dots-{{Braille cell/english&cell2dot-id|input={{{braille}}}}}|Braille dots-{{Braille cell/english&cell2dot-id|input={{{braille}}}}}]]
|}} {{letter reps/links|{{{lang|}}}|braille}} |}
{{documentation}}

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: trying to do a last fix of these, they will be fixed and not bloat the site
revision.text:
{| cellspacing=0 cellpadding=0 width=100% style="text-align: center; background: white;" |- style="font-size: 85%; line-height: 125%;" | width=50% style="border-left: 1px solid silver; border-top: 1px solid silver; line-height:1.3em; padding:0.3em;" | {{letter reps/links|{{{lang|}}}|radio}} | width=50% style="border-left: 1px solid silver; border-top: 1px solid silver; border-right: 1px solid silver;" | {{letter reps/links|{{{lang|}}}|morse}} |- style="font-family: monospace; font-weight: bold; line-height: 100%; font-size:150%" | width=50% style="border-left: 1px solid silver; padding:0.3em;" | {{{radio|}}}
{{{radio_trans|}}} | width=50% style="border-left: 1px solid silver; border-right: 1px solid silver; font-size: large;" | {{#if:{{{morse_sound|}}}|{{audio|{{{morse_sound}}}|{{letter reps/morse|{{{morse|}}}}}|help=no}}|{{letter reps/morse|{{{morse|}}}}}}}{{#if:{{{morsealt|}}}|
OR {{#if:{{{morse_sound|}}}|{{audio|{{{morsealt_sound}}}|{{letter reps/morse|{{{morsealt}}}}}|help=no}}|{{{morsealt|}}}}} ({{{morsealt_exp|}}})}} |} {| cellspacing=0 cellpadding=0 width=100% style="text-align: center; background: white;" |- style="height: 80px;" | width={{#if:{{{sign_img2|}}}|20|25}}% style="border-left: 1px solid silver; border-top: 1px solid silver; padding:0.3em;" | {{#if:{{{flag_img|}}}|[[Image:{{{flag_img|}}}|75px|border]]|}} | width={{#if:{{{sign_img2|}}}|20|25}}% style="border-left: 1px solid silver; border-top: 1px solid silver; padding:0.3em;" | {{#if:{{{sem2|}}}|{{#if:{{{sem3|}}}|[[Image:{{{sem1|}}}|40px]][[Image:{{{sem2|}}}|40px]][[Image:{{{sem3|}}}|40px]]|[[Image:{{{sem1|}}}|50px]][[Image:{{{sem2|}}}|50px]]}}|{{#if:{{{sem1|}}}|[[Image:{{{sem1|}}}|90px]]|}}}} | width={{#if:{{{sign_img2|}}}|20|25}}% style="border-left: 1px solid silver; border-top: 1px solid silver; padding:0.3em;" | {{#if:{{{sign_img|}}}|[[File:{{{sign_img|}}}|90px]]|}}{{ifnotempty|{{{sign_img2|}}}| {{!}} width{{=}}20% style{{=}}"border-left: 1px solid silver; border-top: 1px solid silver; padding:0.3em;" {{!}} [[File:{{{sign_img2|}}}|90px]]|}} | width={{#if:{{{sign_img2|}}}|20|25}}% style="border-left: 1px solid silver; border-right: 1px solid silver; border-top: 1px solid silver; padding:0.3em;" | {{#if:{{{braille_img|}}}|[[Image:{{{braille_img|}}}|77px|{{{braille|}}}]]|{{braille cell|{{{braille|}}}|type=image|size=50px}}}} |- style="font-size: 85%; line-height: 125%;" | width={{#if:{{{sign_img2|}}}|20|25}}% style="border-left: 1px solid silver; border-bottom: 1px solid silver; padding-bottom:0.3em;" | {{letter reps/links|{{{lang|}}}|flag}} | width={{#if:{{{sign_img2|}}}|20|25}}% style="border-left: 1px solid silver; border-bottom: 1px solid silver;" | {{letter reps/links|{{{lang|}}}|sema}} | width={{#if:{{{sign_img2|}}}|20|25}}% style="border-left: 1px solid silver; border-bottom: 1px solid silver;" | {{letter reps/links|{{{lang|}}}|manual}}{{ifnotempty|{{{sign_img2|}}}| {{!}} width{{=}}20% style{{=}}"border-left: 1px solid silver; border-bottom: 1px solid silver;" {{!}} {{letter reps/links|{{{lang|}}}|manual2}}|}} | width={{#if:{{{sign_img2|}}}|20|25}}% style="border-left: 1px solid silver; border-right: 1px solid silver; border-bottom: 1px solid silver;" | {{#if:{{{braille|}}} | [[Braille pattern dots-{{Braille cell/english&cell2dot-id|input={{{braille}}}}}|Braille dots-{{Braille cell/english&cell2dot-id|input={{{braille}}}}}]]
|}} {{letter reps/links|{{{lang|}}}|braille}} |}
{{documentation}}

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24947213578|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{| cellspacing=0 cellpadding=0 width=100% style="text-align: center; background: white;" |- style="font-size: 85%; line-height: 125%;" | width=50% style="border-left: 1px solid silver; border-top: 1px solid silver; line-height:1.3em; padding:0.3em;" | {{letter reps/links|{{{lang|}}}|radio}} | width=50% style="border-left: 1px solid silver; border-top: 1px solid silver; border-right: 1px solid silver;" | {{letter reps/links|{{{lang|}}}|morse}} |- style="font-family: monospace; font-weight: bold; line-height: 100%; font-size:150%" | width=50% style="border-left: 1px solid silver; padding:0.3em;" | {{{radio|}}}
{{{radio_trans|}}} | width=50% style="border-left: 1px solid silver; border-right: 1px solid silver; font-size: large;" | {{#if:{{{morse_sound|}}}|{{audio|{{{morse_sound}}}|{{letter reps/morse|{{{morse|}}}}}|help=no}}|{{letter reps/morse|{{{morse|}}}}}}}{{#if:{{{morsealt|}}}|
OR {{#if:{{{morse_sound|}}}|{{audio|{{{morsealt_sound}}}|{{letter reps/morse|{{{morsealt}}}}}|help=no}}|{{{morsealt|}}}}} ({{{morsealt_exp|}}})}} |} {| cellspacing=0 cellpadding=0 width=100% style="text-align: center; background: white;" |- style="height: 80px;" | width={{#if:{{{sign_img2|}}}|20|25}}% style="border-left: 1px solid silver; border-top: 1px solid silver; padding:0.3em;" | {{#if:{{{flag_img|}}}|[[Image:{{{flag_img|}}}|75px|border]]|}} | width={{#if:{{{sign_img2|}}}|20|25}}% style="border-left: 1px solid silver; border-top: 1px solid silver; padding:0.3em;" | {{#if:{{{sem2|}}}|{{#if:{{{sem3|}}}|[[Image:{{{sem1|}}}|40px]][[Image:{{{sem2|}}}|40px]][[Image:{{{sem3|}}}|40px]]|[[Image:{{{sem1|}}}|50px]][[Image:{{{sem2|}}}|50px]]}}|{{#if:{{{sem1|}}}|[[Image:{{{sem1|}}}|90px]]|}}}} | width={{#if:{{{sign_img2|}}}|20|25}}% style="border-left: 1px solid silver; border-top: 1px solid silver; padding:0.3em;" | {{#if:{{{sign_img|}}}|[[File:{{{sign_img|}}}|90px]]|}}{{ifnotempty|{{{sign_img2|}}}| {{!}} width{{=}}20% style{{=}}"border-left: 1px solid silver; border-top: 1px solid silver; padding:0.3em;" {{!}} [[File:{{{sign_img2|}}}|90px]]|}} | width={{#if:{{{sign_img2|}}}|20|25}}% style="border-left: 1px solid silver; border-right: 1px solid silver; border-top: 1px solid silver; padding:0.3em;" | {{#if:{{{braille_img|}}}|[[Image:{{{braille_img|}}}|77px|{{{braille|}}}]]|{{braille cell|{{{braille|}}}|type=image|size=50px}}}} |- style="font-size: 85%; line-height: 125%;" | width={{#if:{{{sign_img2|}}}|20|25}}% style="border-left: 1px solid silver; border-bottom: 1px solid silver; padding-bottom:0.3em;" | {{letter reps/links|{{{lang|}}}|flag}} | width={{#if:{{{sign_img2|}}}|20|25}}% style="border-left: 1px solid silver; border-bottom: 1px solid silver;" | {{letter reps/links|{{{lang|}}}|sema}} | width={{#if:{{{sign_img2|}}}|20|25}}% style="border-left: 1px solid silver; border-bottom: 1px solid silver;" | {{letter reps/links|{{{lang|}}}|manual}}{{ifnotempty|{{{sign_img2|}}}| {{!}} width{{=}}20% style{{=}}"border-left: 1px solid silver; border-bottom: 1px solid silver;" {{!}} {{letter reps/links|{{{lang|}}}|manual2}}|}} | width={{#if:{{{sign_img2|}}}|20|25}}% style="border-left: 1px solid silver; border-right: 1px solid silver; border-bottom: 1px solid silver;" | {{#if:{{{braille|}}} | [[Braille pattern dots-{{Braille cell/english&cell2dot-id|input={{{braille}}}}}|Braille dots-{{Braille cell/english&cell2dot-id|input={{{braille}}}}}]]
|}} {{letter reps/links|{{{lang|}}}|braille}} |}
